name: ExampleCo
notes: Example top-tier target. Tier 1 = active pursuit.

name: SampleFinancial Holdings
notes: Example of role_filter: only ingest non-PM postings.

name: ExampleWorkdayCo
notes: Workday tenants REQUIRE adapter_config {wd_number, site}. ats_handle is the tenant. URL: https://{ats_handle}.{wd_number}.myworkdayjobs.com/wday/cxs/{ats_handle}/{site}/jobs. A wrong shard = a silent dead board, so verify against the real careers URL.

name: ExampleIcimsCo
notes: iCIMS adapter_config is optional — only set careers_url when the board is NOT at the default https://careers-{ats_handle}.icims.com.
